The Brand Statement

My name is Edrick Mark, though I prefer to be called Cead—consider it the signature on the base of the vessel. Welcome to my metaphorical portfolio. Within these pages, you won't just find work; you'll find a collection of blooms I've nurtured and the sturdy clay of the leadership and adventures that define me.



The Curator of the Bloom

I've fallen in love with capturing the bloom in every light. To me, a self-portrait isn't just a picture; it's a way of documenting how the journey changes the vessel. I take photos to prove that I was there, I was vibrant, and I was growing.

The Gardener of the Ceramic Soul

I've discovered that my true passion isn't just growing my own petals, but in the art of the arrangement. I've learned to love the weight of the pot—the responsibility of ensuring the water is fresh and every stem is supported.

Chasing the Horizon

I want to be known as Cead—not just a name, but a mark of quality and authenticity. I want my 'portfolio' of life to be a testament to what happens when you dare to be both the sturdy container and the wild flower.

© Seed. All rights reserved. | Contact: seedling@gmail.com

); } export default HomePage;
